title: What does the next training paradigm look like?
summary: Dwarkesh Patel discusses the next training paradigm beyond current supervised learning and RLHF approaches. Topics include grindability versus verifiability, reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), test-time compute through dreaming, and what AI training will look like by 2027.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel maps out what AI training could look like beyond supervised learning and RLHF. The discussion frames the shift through several axes: grindability versus verifiability, reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), and test-time compute approached through dreaming. The throughline is a projection of where training methods are headed by 2027, situating current reinforcement learning practice against these emerging directions.
